title: epistemos.semantic.v1
description: CoALA-style semantic memory fact. A typed claim about the world or the user that has been extracted, verified, and committed for future reference. Distinguished from epistemos.episode.v1 by atemporality: 'user prefers Pacific time' is semantic; 'user moved time pref to Pacific on 2026-05-14' is episodic. Stored append-only with retraction-propagation per ClaimLedger. Recall via memory.semantic_recall.

predicate.description: Typed relation. Must come from the predicate-vocabulary enum maintained in soul.md (user-extensible).

subject.description: Canonical concept id or proper noun (e.g. 'user', 'project_epistemos', 'concept_attention_as_interrupt').

object.description: Canonical concept id, literal value, or short noun phrase.

confidence.description: Posterior confidence after retraction propagation. 0.0 = retracted, 1.0 = user-confirmed.

claim_kind.description: 9-arm Kleene K3 claim classifier per helios v5 first.md §1.5. The π field of the Resonance Σ-signature.

ref.description: Path / URL / id pointing at the evidence.

evidence.description: Supporting evidence. knowledge.qa_over_vault REFUSES to surface a fact without at least one evidence entry (the 'untraceable claim' invariant).

established_at.description: When this fact entered the ledger.

retracted_at.description: Set when claim is retracted. Retraction propagates to dependent facts per ClaimLedger.RetractionPropagated.

retracts.description: fact_ids this claim retracts. Bounded-walk depth ≤ MAX_RETRACTION_WALK_DEPTH = 16 per ledger.rs.

derives_from.description: Other fact_ids this claim was derived from. Drives DerivesFrom edges in the Cognitive DAG.
